name: Dashdot
description: Dashdot is a modern, beautiful server dashboard that displays system information like CPU, RAM, storage, network, and GPU usage in real-time. It features a sleek, customizable interface with support for multiple widgets and themes.

paths.name: Host Root
paths.description: Host root filesystem mounted read-only for system information gathering (CPU, RAM, storage, network stats).

variables.name: Widget Layout
variables.description: Widget layout: 'grid', 'list', or custom order like 'os,cpu,storage,ram,network'.

variables.name: Accept IGD
variables.description: Allow internal GPU device access for GPU monitoring. Set to false if no GPU.

variables.name: OS Widget
variables.description: Enable OS information widget (distribution, kernel, uptime).

variables.name: CPU Widget
variables.description: Enable CPU usage and temperature widget.

variables.name: Network Widget
variables.description: Enable network speed and usage widget.

variables.name: GPU Widget
variables.description: Enable GPU monitoring widget. Set to true only if you have a GPU.
